entries.title: Payload Too Large
entries.description: The request body exceeds the configured limit. Published as a problem `type` only: the platform HTTP-security layer does not attach a `code` member to this response.

entries.title: request conflicts with current state
entries.description: OpenAPI contract umbrella example for 409 responses; not emitted verbatim at runtime. Runtime responses use specific codes such as `idempotency.conflict` or `target.match_ambiguous`.

entries.title: request is too large
entries.description: OpenAPI contract umbrella example for 413 responses; not emitted verbatim at runtime. Runtime responses use specific codes such as `batch.too_large` or `federation.payload_too_large`.
